body: cycle-2 reframe per review-spec-2026-05-25.md: shifted ac-02..ac-05 scope source from unfielded adjacent_files to agent-typed (substrate the agent already reads); added smoke-marker verification clause to ac-02..ac-05; hardened ac-04 PR-diff resolution (gh first, git fallback, bypass on failure); ac-07 lead flipped to retain-as-backstop (610/0 doesn't decompose pipeline-vs-ad-hoc); ac-08 gains per-repo pre-ship baselines captured BEFORE the first edit; ac-01 gains skill-tool return contract and the new hook lead; ac-06 explicitly docs-only
